# Love — Collectible Art Ehon
> Limited edition shunga-inspired illustrated book by Sveta Dorosheva and Mikhail Novoselov.

## About
Love is a collectible fine art object — a shunga-inspired ehon (Japanese illustrated book format). Two independent watoji volumes with kasane mechanic generating 1,600 unique cross-seam images. Handcrafted: 160g washi-like paper, wood kakemono crossbar, sliding shōji wooden case. Landscape format 260 × 340 mm. Limited edition, pre-order / waitlist.

## The Mechanic — Kasane
Kasane (重ね, "layering"): the cut edges of two volumes are placed side by side, creating a new composite image across the seam. 40 pages × 40 pages = 1,600 unique image combinations. Each combination is unrepeatable.

## Additional Mechanics
- Mitate (見立て): poetic substitution — each image works independently and in combination
- Kakemono (掛物): wood crossbar allows the book to be displayed as a hanging scroll
- Nozoki (覗き): the act of sliding open the shōji case is itself a gesture of discovery

## Team
- Illustrations: Sveta Dorosheva (https://svetadorosheva.com)
- Creative Direction: Mikhail Novoselov

## Format
- 260 × 340 mm landscape, two 19 × 27 cm watoji volumes, 40 pages each
- Paper: 160g washi-like uncoated
- Binding: watoji (Japanese stab binding)
- Case: sliding shōji wooden box
- Limited edition. Pre-order / waitlist.
